decisions.question: Project structure
decisions.rationale: Simplest setup. One install, one start command. Backend + Next.js colocated.

decisions.question: Startup command
decisions.rationale: Starts both backend API + Next.js frontend via concurrently. Supabase assumed already running on Docker.

guardrails: npm install && npx playwright install must be the complete setup sequence
npm run dev must start the full app
README must document the single start command
No external dependencies beyond Supabase on Docker
